THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCARTHY, KENYAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 15 LINCOLN WAY #102, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $2,333.60 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,333.60, STAYED UNTIL JUN-03-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, NO FURTHER STAYS. ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED. IF DEFT VACATES TIMELY AND COMPLIES WITH STIP, PLTF WILL DISMISS W/PREJUDICE. MUTUAL RELEASE & WAIVER. DEFT'S SECURITY DEPOSIT CREDITED TO UNPAID RENT IF PREM. LEFT BRROM-CLEAN.
